title: Firechief 1kg Powder Fire Extinguisher - Red Fire Extinguisher for Home - Multi Purpose Powder Supplied with Bracket - Kitemark Certified to BS EN 3, LPCB and MED Approved - FMP1 Model
description: From the manufacturer Where do you need a Firechief fire extinguisher? In your home The Firechief FMP1 Powder Fire Extinguisher is great for extinguishing combustible material, liquids, gases, and electrical fires so it is great for your kitchen, home office, living room, garden, garage, or other living areas. In your car A 1kg powder fire extinguisher is the ideal travelling extinguisher as it is compact, reliable, and versatile. The Firechief FMP1 fire extinguisher tackles combustible material, liquids, and small electrical fires meaning that many traditional (petrol or diesel) car fires can be tackled quickly. In your campervan or caravan Similarly, your campervan or caravan can have a multitude of fire risks. This small powder fire extinguisher can give peace of mind that, should the worst happen, you would have fire safety equipment close by to help you fight a fire if it was safe to do so. In your office or workplace If you have a small working space or an office at the end of your garden it is essential to make sure that you have adequate fire protection. The Firechief FMP1 powder extinguisher can extinguish common office fires as well as being suitable for use around common electrics. How to use a small powder fire extinguisher: Remove the safety pin Hold the extinguisher upright and stay calm. Ensure your grip is firm but not too tight on the handles, wrap your finger around the hole and pull firmly to remove the pin. Aim and squeeze the handles Gripping the handles firmly, point the extinguisher towards the bottom of the fire. Squeeze the handles together to release the jet of powder towards the bottom of the fire. Sweep from side to side Move the fire extinguisher from left to right to cover the base of the fire, using all of the contents of the powder fire extinguisher. For families To keep your family and home safe from the risk of fire. Small extinguishers are essential to tackle small, manageable fires, and should be stored in an easy, reachable place in case the worst happens. Education on fire safety should also be shared with all those living in the home so that everyone can stay safe and know what to do in the case of an emergency. For DIYers To keep your projects and innovations moving forward safe from the risk of fire. Sawdust, angle grinders, welding equipment, and other DIY equipment and activities can cause a multitude of fire risks. A small fire extinguisher can provide peace of mind but also be used quickly and easily in the moment to protect your project, home, and loved ones. For students To stay alert to the risk of fire and keep yourself, friends, and housemates safe. Small fire extinguishers should be supplied in HMOs and student accommodation kitchens, however, an added layer of protection in other areas of the home or building will protect everyone in it. This easy-to-use extinguisher can be utilised by anyone but education on fire safety should be shared with everyone. For travellers To keep yourself and others safe around the country and beyond! With everything in a compact space, caravans and campervans can contain several fire risks - many people will have experienced a close call in their time! A small fire extinguisher can be stored in the vehicle without taking up precious room. This small cargo has a big impact in emergency situations, protecting you and your loved ones.
